stemHtml: According to OPS regulations, an operator shall not operate an aeroplane authorized to carry more than 19 passengers for which individual Certificate of Airworthiness was first issued before 01 July 2008, unless it is equipped with, at least:

options.a: one automatic ELT and one ELT of any type
options.b: one automatic ELT or two ELT of any type
options.c: one ELT of any type transmitting on 406 MHz
options.d: one survival ELT and life saving equipment
